MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-09-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ESTHER NNADI'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. IRINA NADUHOVSKAYA APPEARING AS LIMITED SCOPE COUNSEL FOR THIS HEARING. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION AS TO WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO WAIVER OF COURT REPORTERS' FEE FOR TRIAL. NOTICE OF LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION FILED WITH THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
